title: Stink Bug Control Upper West Side | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional stink bug control in Upper West Side, Manhattan. Experienced local exterminators serving UWS homes & apartments. Call now for same-day service starting at $350.
intro: Stink bugs have become an increasingly common problem in Upper West Side apartments and brownstones, especially during fall and winter months when they seek warm shelter. These shield-shaped insects emit a foul odor when disturbed and can quickly infest your Upper West Side home through window frames, vents, and cracks. Best Pest Control NYC provides effective stink bug elimination services throughout the Upper West Side, from riverside buildings to Central Park West residences.
whyUs: Our technicians have extensive experience treating stink bug infestations in Upper West Side's diverse housing stock, from pre-war walk-ups to modern high-rises. We use proven exclusion methods and targeted treatments that eliminate stink bugs without harsh odors, perfect for the close quarters of Manhattan living.
localContext: The Upper West Side's proximity to Central Park and Riverside Park, combined with the neighborhood's many pre-war buildings with original windows, creates ideal entry points for stink bugs seeking overwintering sites. The tree-lined streets between Columbus Avenue and West End Avenue are particularly susceptible to seasonal stink bug migrations into residential buildings.

faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Upper West Side apartments?
faqs.answer: The Upper West Side's abundant green spaces like Central Park and Riverside Park provide perfect outdoor habitats for stink bugs. As temperatures drop in fall, these insects migrate toward warm buildings, entering through gaps around windows, AC units, and the small cracks common in pre-war construction. Once inside, they congregate in large numbers near window frames and ceilings.

faqs.question: What's included in your $350-$550 stink bug control service?
faqs.answer: Our service includes a thorough inspection of your Upper West Side property, identification of entry points, targeted treatment of infested areas, sealing of common entry points, and removal of existing stink bugs. We also provide exclusion recommendations specific to your building type and a follow-up visit if needed within our service guarantee period.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a stink bug problem in the Upper West Side?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout the Upper West Side. Our team is familiar with the neighborhood from Lincoln Center to Columbia University and can typically arrive within hours of your call during business hours. We understand that stink bug infestations can be unpleasant and prioritize rapid response for UWS residents.

faqs.question: Will the treatment smell bad or disturb my neighbors?
faqs.answer: Our stink bug treatments are specifically designed for Manhattan apartments and co-ops where odor and discretion matter. We use low-odor products and careful handling techniques that prevent stink bugs from releasing their defensive spray. Our methods are safe for buildings with shared ventilation systems and won't cause disturbances to neighbors in adjacent units.
